FAILURE TO CERTIFY CORRECTION ON IMMEDIATELY HAZARDOUS (CLASS 1) ECB VIOLATION

AS PER CONDITIONS OBSERVED REGARDING BALCONY RAILING & GLASS PANELS OBSERVED/OPEN SPACINGS EXCEEDING MAXIMUM BUILDING CODE REQUIREMENT REMEDY:OWNER TO IMMEDIATELY RETAIN A NYS LICENSED PROFESSIONAL TO PERFORM A 100%HANDS ON INSPECT.OF ALL BALCONY RAIING&GLAZING.CONDITION SYSTEM PROV.INSPECT.REPORT&REPAIR PLAN SUBMIT TO DOBBY 2/14/22

VACATE ORDER-APT 3G EXP 3 SOUTH ELEVATION: STEEL AND GLASS BALCONY RAILING DISPLAY UNSAFE OPENINGS NOT IN COMPLIANCE WITH NYC BLDG CODE REMEDY: PROVIDE AND MAINTAIN SAFETY MEASURES TO PREVENT ACCESS TO APARTMENT 3G BALCONY

MULTIPLE HAZARDOUS CONDITIONS SUCH AS BALCONY SLAB,SPALLING,MISSING GA PS AT BALCONY RAILING,AND MOVEMENT IN GLASS AT BALCONY RAILINGS WAS DE TECTED IN MULTIPLE LOCATIONS.THESE CONDITIONS HAVE THEREFORE MADE ALL BALCONIES AND TERRACES AT EXP1 WEST ELEV AND EXP3 EAST ELEV UNABLE TO BE OCCUPIED.REMEDY:VACATE ALL BALCONIES AND TERRACES AT EXP1 AND 3
